judgments.comparative_verdict: Report 2 answered better: it hit all five expectations including the mis-ordering/structure point, which Report 1 addressed only vaguely.

report_1.evidence: `larkpay-comms/incidents/OPS-412-timeline.md` shows: failures began 14:03, the first page did not fire until 14:50 (47 minutes later)

report_2.evidence: `incidents/OPS-412-timeline.md` shows failures began at 14:03 and the first alert did not fire until 14:50 — a 47-minute detection gap, not minutes.

report_1.evidence: `larkpay-comms/incidents/OPS-412-timeline.md` states 1,284 transactions failed and required manual reprocessing, and 37 were unrecoverable and had to be refunded.

report_2.evidence: `incidents/OPS-412-timeline.md` states 1,284 transactions failed and required manual reprocessing, and 37 were unrecoverable and refunded.

report_1.evidence: `larkpay-comms/docs/sla-commitments.md` states the contractual monthly uptime SLA is 99.9%... `larkpay-comms/metrics/uptime-2026.csv` shows April 2026 uptime was `99.77`, below the 99.9% threshold — a confirmed SLA breach.

report_2.evidence: `docs/sla-commitments.md` sets the contractual monthly uptime SLA at 99.9%, with service credits owed for any month below that. `metrics/uptime-2026.csv` shows April 2026 uptime at **99.77%**, below the SLA threshold.

report_1.evidence: `larkpay-comms/docs/customer-comms-style-guide.md` rule 1 is "Never assign blame to an individual"... The draft states "The outage was caused by the on-call engineer deploying an untested config change"... and must be rewritten

report_2.evidence: `docs/customer-comms-style-guide.md` rule 1 explicitly forbids assigning blame to an individual in anything sent to customers. This sentence must be rewritten

`docs/customer-comms-style-guide.md` rule 3 requires leading with impact and remediation. Instead, `drafts/...md` opens with a self-congratulatory uptime claim (line 3) and buries the (already-inaccurate) impact statement and remediation at lines 10 and 21, after several paragraphs of reassurance/marketing language.
